articles.title: Uncertainty and Calibration Under Shift, Noise, and Autocorrelation: A Simulation Benchmark
articles.notes: Simulation benchmark for uncertainty in regression, classification, and forecasting under shift, noise, and temporal dependence.

articles.title: Stress-Testing Online Change-Point Detection Under Missingness, Outliers, and Seasonality: A Simulation Study
Geodesic Non-Local Means for Geometry-Aware Image Denoising
articles.notes: Research codebase for geometry-aware image denoising with reliable baselines, graph-based geodesic denoising methods, reproducible experiments, and publication-ready paper artifacts (figures, tables, and LaTeX alignment).

articles.title: Calibration vs accuracy trade-offs
articles.notes: Need to strengthen simulation design and references.

articles.title: Synthetic smart-home stress testing for ML systems
articles.notes: Repository scaffold exists, experiments not complete yet.

articles.title: Curvature-adaptive nearest-neighbour classification
articles.notes: Core repo is in place; reminder issue should be closed.

articles.title: TMLE Missingness Simulation Study
articles.notes: Simulation study comparing MI + Rubin versus missingness-aware orthogonal estimators with bootstrap or BLB inference for causal effects under missing data.

articles.title: pro-particles
articles.notes: NumPy-first interacting-particle sampler for Proper-Scoring-Rule posteriors with log-score and MMD² examples.

articles.title: Curvature-Adaptive k-NN on Nonlinear Manifolds
articles.notes: Research codebase for curvature-adaptive nearest-neighbour classification, including fixed-k, curvature-adaptive, and curvature-weighted k-NN with reproducible synthetic benchmarks, runtime tracking, and paper artifact generation.

articles.title: Economic Crises as Redistribution Operators: A Dynamical Systems Model of Wage Decline, Wealth Concentration, and Policy Control
articles.notes: Reproducible research repo with formal dynamical systems model, ETL pipeline for inequality/macro/labour data, simulation code, empirical panel analysis, and policy counterfactuals. Treats crisis outcomes as government choices.

articles.title: Wealth Concentration as a Destructive Attractor: A Conditional Dynamical-Systems Benchmark
articles.notes: Benchmark two-variable dynamical-systems paper proving conditional local collapse stability under explicit institutional and demand-side thresholds, with equilibrium geometry, basin structure, separatrix analysis, and bifurcation results. Model-internal and non-empirical by design.

articles.title: From Destructive Attractors to Institutional Resilience: Calibration, Stochastic Escape, and Policy Counterfactuals
articles.notes: Extension paper adding public-data calibration, SMM and ABC identification checks, weak-identification diagnostics, three-variable bargaining dynamics, ABM consistency, stochastic escape, EVT-style rare-event analysis, and policy counterfactuals. Uses the benchmark theorem from Paper 1 without re-proving it.

articles.title: From Bargaining Collapse to Institutional Erosion: Higher-Dimensional Destructive Attractor Models
articles.notes: Higher-dimensional theory paper developing the 3D bargaining model and 4D endogenous-institutions model as a hierarchy extending the 2D benchmark. Focuses on forward invariance, equilibria, resilience regions, deterministic simulations, basin slices, and continuation diagnostics.

articles.title: Monte Carlo Cartography of Destructive Attractors: Collapse Probabilities, Resilience Thresholds, and Global Sensitivity
articles.notes: Computational uncertainty paper building a Monte Carlo atlas across the 2D, 3D, and 4D model hierarchy. Covers parameter and initial-condition uncertainty, stochastic shocks, collapse and resilience probability maps, first-passage summaries, and global sensitivity analysis without making empirical-probability claims.

articles.title: Koopman Early-Warning Indicators for Destructive Attractors in Political-Economy Dynamical Systems
articles.notes: Methodological paper applying Koopman operator methods and EDMD to derive slow modes, basin-separating observables, and short-window collapse predictors across the model hierarchy. Emphasizes model-internal diagnostics, spectral comparison, and robustness rather than empirical forecasting.

articles.title: Topological Cartography of Collapse and Resilience: Morse Graphs and Basin Structure in Destructive-Attractor Models
articles.notes: Set-oriented topology paper constructing coarse global state-space summaries through box decompositions, transition graphs, recurrent components, Morse-style graphs, and basin comparisons across 2D, 3D, and 4D models. Claims are explicitly resolution- and flow-time-dependent rather than theorem-level topology statements.

articles.title: Open-Access Municipal Housing Price Dynamics in Portugal: Replication and Multi-Layer Extension Scaffolds
articles.notes: Open-access Portuguese municipal housing research pipeline that reproduces the 2017 cross-sectional housing-price model and extends it with auditable ETL, validation, model-ready datasets, panel econometrics, spatial diagnostics and spatial models, RNAL exposure collection, causal scaffolds, granular data architecture, and temporal clustering. The repository is explicit that substantive empirical claims depend on official input data and that spatial, clustering, and causal layers have distinct inferential status.

articles.title: From Chaos to Crisis: Using Dynamical-Systems Extreme Value Theory in Econometrics
articles.notes: Applies extreme value theory from dynamical systems (Milhazes Freitas framework) to econometric analysis of rare events, crises, and tail dependence. Includes simulation utilities for chaotic maps, rare-event diagnostics (exceedances, extremal index, return/hitting times), multivariate stress analysis, and reproduction package with YAML-based experiment orchestration. Designed for both Medium article and future formal paper.
